title: sloanea curatellifolia
intro: Sloanea curatellifolia, also known as the 'Malabar plum', is a species of plant in the family Eopteridiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Malabar plum is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to aid in digestion and provide relief from fever and other ailments. Herbal preparations of Sloanea curatellifolia include extracts that can be used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
